=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (6:3-6:13) TS377018: This expression discards the success value through mapping. `Effect.asVoid` represents that form directly. effect(effectMapVoid)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectMapVoid for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectMapVoid for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.asVoid"

  Fix 0: "Disable effectMapVoid for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectMapVoid for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.asVoid"

  Fix 0: "Disable effectMapVoid for this line"

  Fix 1: "Disable effectMapVoid for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.asVoid"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable effectMapVoid for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable effectMapVoid for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.asVoid" ===

--- file:///.src/effectMapVoid.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import { Effect } from "effect"

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => void 0)
export const shouldTriggerVoid0 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.asVoid
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => undefined)
export const shouldTriggerUndefined = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => undefined)
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => {})
export const shouldTriggerEmptyBlock = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => {})
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => (undefined)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  // eslint-disable-next-line @effect/dprint
  Effect.map(() => (undefined))
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => (void 0)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedVoid0 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => (void 0))
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => ((undefined))) - double parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerDoubleParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  // eslint-disable-next-line @effect/dprint
  Effect.map(() => ((undefined)))
)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.map with actual transformation
export const shouldNotTriggerTransform = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n * 2)
)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.map with non-void return
export const shouldNotTriggerNonVoid = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => 42)
)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.map with string return
export const shouldNotTriggerString = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => "hello")
)

// Should NOT trigger: already using asVoid
export const shouldNotTriggerAsVoid = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.asVoid
)


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable effectMapVoid for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable effectMapVoid for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.asVoid" ===

--- file:///.src/effectMapVoid.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import { Effect } from "effect"

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => void 0)
export const shouldTriggerVoid0 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => void 0)
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => undefined)
export const shouldTriggerUndefined = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.asVoid
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => {})
export const shouldTriggerEmptyBlock = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => {})
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => (undefined)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  // eslint-disable-next-line @effect/dprint
  Effect.map(() => (undefined))
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => (void 0)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedVoid0 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => (void 0))
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => ((undefined))) - double parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerDoubleParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  // eslint-disable-next-line @effect/dprint
  Effect.map(() => ((undefined)))
)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.map with actual transformation
export const shouldNotTriggerTransform = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n * 2)
)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.map with non-void return
export const shouldNotTriggerNonVoid = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => 42)
)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.map with string return
export const shouldNotTriggerString = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => "hello")
)

// Should NOT trigger: already using asVoid
export const shouldNotTriggerAsVoid = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.asVoid
)


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable effectMapVoid for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable effectMapVoid for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.asVoid" ===

--- file:///.src/effectMapVoid.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import { Effect } from "effect"

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => void 0)
export const shouldTriggerVoid0 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => void 0)
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => undefined)
export const shouldTriggerUndefined = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => undefined)
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => {})
export const shouldTriggerEmptyBlock = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.asVoid
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => (undefined)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  // eslint-disable-next-line @effect/dprint
  Effect.map(() => (undefined))
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => (void 0)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedVoid0 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => (void 0))
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => ((undefined))) - double parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerDoubleParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  // eslint-disable-next-line @effect/dprint
  Effect.map(() => ((undefined)))
)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.map with actual transformation
export const shouldNotTriggerTransform = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n * 2)
)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.map with non-void return
export const shouldNotTriggerNonVoid = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => 42)
)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.map with string return
export const shouldNotTriggerString = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => "hello")
)

// Should NOT trigger: already using asVoid
export const shouldNotTriggerAsVoid = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.asVoid
)


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable effectMapVoid for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable effectMapVoid for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.asVoid" ===

--- file:///.src/effectMapVoid.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import { Effect } from "effect"

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => void 0)
export const shouldTriggerVoid0 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => void 0)
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => undefined)
export const shouldTriggerUndefined = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => undefined)
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => {})
export const shouldTriggerEmptyBlock = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => {})
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => (undefined)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  // eslint-disable-next-line @effect/dprint
  Effect.asVoid
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => (void 0)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedVoid0 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => (void 0))
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => ((undefined))) - double parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerDoubleParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  // eslint-disable-next-line @effect/dprint
  Effect.map(() => ((undefined)))
)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.map with actual transformation
export const shouldNotTriggerTransform = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n * 2)
)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.map with non-void return
export const shouldNotTriggerNonVoid = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => 42)
)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.map with string return
export const shouldNotTriggerString = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => "hello")
)

// Should NOT trigger: already using asVoid
export const shouldNotTriggerAsVoid = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.asVoid
)


=== [D5] Fix 0: "Disable effectMapVoid for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 1: "Disable effectMapVoid for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.asVoid" ===

--- file:///.src/effectMapVoid.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import { Effect } from "effect"

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => void 0)
export const shouldTriggerVoid0 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => void 0)
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => undefined)
export const shouldTriggerUndefined = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => undefined)
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => {})
export const shouldTriggerEmptyBlock = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => {})
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => (undefined)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  // eslint-disable-next-line @effect/dprint
  Effect.map(() => (undefined))
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => (void 0)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedVoid0 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.asVoid
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => ((undefined))) - double parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerDoubleParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  // eslint-disable-next-line @effect/dprint
  Effect.map(() => ((undefined)))
)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.map with actual transformation
export const shouldNotTriggerTransform = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n * 2)
)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.map with non-void return
export const shouldNotTriggerNonVoid = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => 42)
)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.map with string return
export const shouldNotTriggerString = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => "hello")
)

// Should NOT trigger: already using asVoid
export const shouldNotTriggerAsVoid = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.asVoid
)


=== [D6] Fix 0: "Disable effectMapVoid for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 1: "Disable effectMapVoid for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.asVoid" ===

--- file:///.src/effectMapVoid.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import { Effect } from "effect"

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => void 0)
export const shouldTriggerVoid0 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => void 0)
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => undefined)
export const shouldTriggerUndefined = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => undefined)
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => {})
export const shouldTriggerEmptyBlock = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => {})
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => (undefined)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  // eslint-disable-next-line @effect/dprint
  Effect.map(() => (undefined))
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => (void 0)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedVoid0 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => (void 0))
)

// Should trigger: Effect.map(() => ((undefined))) - double parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerDoubleParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  // eslint-disable-next-line @effect/dprint
  Effect.asVoid
)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.map with actual transformation
export const shouldNotTriggerTransform = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n * 2)
)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.map with non-void return
export const shouldNotTriggerNonVoid = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => 42)
)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.map with string return
export const shouldNotTriggerString = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map(() => "hello")
)

// Should NOT trigger: already using asVoid
export const shouldNotTriggerAsVoid = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.asVoid
)
